title: Action (v2, multi-agent extension)
description: v2 extension of v1 Action. Adds source_agent_id and delegation_blocked to enforce Invariant 2 (Non-Bypass) across agent boundaries. If source_agent_id is non-null AND decision_ref is null, the Action MUST be rejected. Rejection, not flagging.
$comment: Extends v1 Action. The delegation_blocked field makes the Non-Bypass check machine-verifiable in multi-agent topologies. EB-1 (HYP_ prefix rejection) remains in force.

decision_ref.description: Reference to the authorizing Decision. Must be DEC_ prefix. HYP_ prefix rejected (EB-1).

source_agent_id.description: Net-new in v2. Reference to AgentIdentity.agent_id of the agent that originated the action request, or null if human-originated. Used in conjunction with delegation_blocked check.

delegation_blocked.description: Net-new in v2. Hard-coded true. If the orchestrator detects source_agent_id is non-null AND decision_ref is null OR invalid, the Action is REJECTED at construction. Not logged-and-continued. Governance rationale: Invariant 2 (Non-Bypass) extension into multi-agent topologies.
